commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And they departed from Kibrothhattaavah, and encamped at Hazeroth. Haseroth, near Cades-barne, the same as Aserim, ("the unwalled towns "of the Heveans, extending as far as Gaza) or Asor, called afterwards Esron, on the south of Chanaan, Josue xi. Moses does not specify here the memorable encampment at Cades-barne, where the Israelites arrived, after 11 days' march from Horeb, Deuteronomy i. It was not far from Asor, on the frontiers of Idumea, (Calmet) in the desert of Pharan, chap.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
